# Rust Gotchas

> Known Rust patterns that cause blocking, panics, or silent performance degradation. Load all HIGH entries before writing async Rust code.

## Entries

- [Blocking std::fs calls on Tokio runtime starve the executor](blocking-io-on-tokio.md): Path::exists(), metadata(), and read_dir() from std::fs block the async executor thread. Use tokio::fs or spawn_blocking instead. HIGH.
